title: schoenus calostachyus var. distans
intro: Schoenus calostachyus var. distans, also known as a type of sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Schoenus calostachyus var. distans include its ability to reduce swelling, promote healing, and provide relief from pain and discomfort. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve to treat various skin conditions.
